focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
【金融新闻】欧洲人疯抢的“卡bug空调”藏着中国智造硬功夫
【中国新闻】“七七事变”89周年，中国人永不能忘！
【世界新闻】Why a Diljit Dosanjh film vanished from streaming after two days

items.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
items.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim,

items.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
items.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

items.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
items.summary: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

items.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
items.summary: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

items.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
items.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

items.title: 欧洲人疯抢的“卡bug空调”藏着中国智造硬功夫
items.summary: 今年夏天，一场热浪席卷欧洲大陆，多地气温突破历史极值。空调这个曾被许多欧洲家庭视为“非必需品”的家电，突然成了“硬通货”。

items.title: 中国空调海外爆单是不是热浪红利？
items.summary: 刘小燕

items.title: 在车内能吃火锅、晾衣服、养鱼——汽车的这些配置，你喜欢吗？
items.summary: 本报记者 徐佩玉

items.title: “七七事变”89周年，中国人永不能忘！
items.summary: 宛平城，北京丰台一座古城

items.title: 山西长治市长陈向阳辞职，龚孟建代理市长，此前当地煤矿爆炸致82人死亡
items.summary: 据山西长治电视台7月6日晚公开报道，当日，长治市十五届人大常委会举行第三十五次会议。会议决定任命龚孟建为长治市人民政府副市长，决定龚孟建代理长治市人民政府市长。

items.title: 挪威首相斯特勒会见王毅
items.summary: 新华社奥斯陆7月6日电(记者张玉亮)挪威首相斯特勒6日在奥斯陆会见中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅。

items.title: 王毅同挪威外交大臣艾德会谈
items.summary: 新华社奥斯陆7月6日电(记者张玉亮)当地时间7月6日，中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅在奥斯陆同挪威外交大臣艾德举行会谈。

items.title: 龚孟建代理山西长治市市长 原市长陈向阳辞职
items.summary: 中新网太原7月7日电 (陆祁国)据山西长治电视台7月6日晚公开报道，当日，长治市十五届人大常委会举行第三十五次会议。会议决定任命龚孟建为长治市人民政府副市长，决定龚孟建代理长治市人民政府市长。

items.title: Why a Diljit Dosanjh film vanished from streaming after two days
items.summary: The film's troubled journey spans years of censorship disputes, court battles and an unexpected release on a streaming platform.

items.title: Can China repeat its EV success with robotaxis?
items.summary: China's self-driving car firms have been given a headstart by the country's EV supply chain as they expand globally.

items.title: Ukraine warns of interceptor missile shortage as 23 killed in Kyiv region
items.summary: President Zelensky says Sunday's "massive Russian attack" on Kyiv consisted of 68 missiles and 351 strike drones.

items.title: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
items.summary: President Donald Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review United States striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension at the World Cup.

items.title: Charlie Kirk's family attends hearing for suspect charged with his murder
items.summary: Tyler Robinson, 23, is accused of murdering Kirk, a key Trump ally and founder of youth organisation Turning Point USA.

items.title: elder-plinius/T3MP3ST（⭐ 2626）
items.summary: autonomous red teaming platform; multi-agent offensive-security meta-harness

items.title: mekos2772/ios-location-spoofer（⭐ 1432）
items.summary: Standalone iOS app to spoof GPS location without jailbreak. Includes Shadowrocket/Surge/Loon/QX/Stash module.

items.title: HUANGCHIHHUNGLeo/claude-real-video（⭐ 1240）
items.summary: Let Claude (or any LLM) actually watch a video — scene-aware, deduplicated frames + transcript, from a URL or local file. Runs locally, MIT.

items.title: ammaarreshi/Generals-Mac-iOS-iPad（⭐ 1142）
items.summary: Command & Conquer Generals: Zero Hour running natively on macOS, iPhone & iPad — real engine (EA GPL v3 source, via GeneralsX), DXVK/MoltenVK renderer, RTS touch controls. No game assets included.

items.title: jamesob/local-llm（⭐ 1069）
items.summary: Everything I know about running LLMs locally
